name: Deep Kiss
descrip: Deeply kiss your opponent. Can charm them and has a high chance to crit.
outcome: [AttackerName]'s tongue invades [TargetName]'s mouth, aggressively teasing [TargetHisOrHer] mouth as their tongues intertwine!
miss: [AttackerName] tongue invades [TargetName]'s mouth, aggressively teasing [TargetHisOrHer] mouth, but [TargetName] manages to endure the intense kiss!
statusOutcome: [TargetName]'s mind fogs up from the intimacy! [TargetName] is charmed!
